free_text: CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
The total angle-dependent error. The angle
dependent errors arises from several factors. The error
in estimating the background (taken to be 1/4 of the
background) contributes. Also, the statistics of the
total number of counts in the peak, including the back-
ground, and separately the statistics of the background
Uncertainty in the alignment of the chamber
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
